series_metadata.series_description: These files contain reports for each savings bank regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions ("DFI") under Chapters 1161., 1163. and 1165. of the Ohio Revised Code. These records also contain related examination report correspondence regarding directives issued by the DFI.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm twenty (20) years date of examination report ; Electronic: electronic files twenty (20) years date of examination report
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
